## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Teero and GrowthX to discuss SEO progress, content strategy, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance improved with 80 clicks last week, the highest ever](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [AI-related dental content is trending; new articles on AI receptionists and insurance verification in production](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Exploring programmatic SEO for location-based dental staffing content](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [GrowthX nearing Series A closure, planning to hire engineers to improve content production capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [80 clicks in the last week, highest ever recorded](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Impressions still low, but increasing clicks indicate improved SERP visibility](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [SEMrush detected algorithm updates in early January and February, potentially affecting rankings](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Hypothesis: Recent algorithm updates may favor AI-generated content, leading to quicker ranking improvements](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Top Performing Content

  - "Dental Hygienist Benefits" article is \#1 in sessions
  - [Followed by "Dental Recall Script" and "Dental Blogs"](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Two template blog posts in the top 10](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)

### AI-focused Content Strategy

  - [High demand for dental AI topics at the conference (e.g., receptionists, insurance verification)](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)
  - [New AI-related articles scheduled for next week:](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
      - [Best AI dental software solutions](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=837.0)
      - [Dental treatment planning with AI](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Potential for "Top 10 dental AI receptionist companies" type content](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)

### Content Production Challenges

  - [AirOps experiencing workflow delays and errors](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [GrowthX exploring non-AirOps solutions to scale content production](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Series A funding closure imminent, allowing for hiring of engineers to improve content production capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)

### Conversion Optimization

  - [Proposal to create targeted conversion panels within blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [Customized CTAs based on audience (e.g., dental offices vs. hygienists)](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [Nate approved the idea for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to research and propose new AI-focused dental topics](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Investigate potential for programmatic SEO on location-based dental staffing content](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Implement targeted conversion panels in blog posts (pending Frank's input)](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [Review performance reports shared in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/7VAKjZYJy6UVGNMvaPuxbp2JWezt-MaU?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
